placements.overview:
Established in 1981, Asian Workers Development Institute (AWDI) is a private institute in Rourkela, Orissa. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 3 courses in Full Time mode. The popular Asian Workers Development Institute (AWDI) programs include MBA/PGDM and UG Diploma. Asian Workers Development Institute (AWDI) courses are provided in several streams including Business & Management Studies, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 148 students. The fees at Asian Workers Development Institute (AWDI) ranges between INR 35,500 to 1,87,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

Asian Workers Development Institute (AWDI) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Asian Workers Development Institute (AWDI) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Asian Workers Development Institute (AWDI) courses stands around INR 35,500 to 1,87,000.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding DAV College, Amritsar Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

faqs.answer: A:    DAV College, Amritsar provides programmes including MBA/PGDM, M.Sc, M.A, M.Com, PG Diploma, B.M.M, BBA, B.A, B.Com, B.J.M.C, B.Sc, BCA in streams such as Hospitality & Travel, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Travel & Tourism Management, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, Media Planning.
faqs.question: Which courses does DAV College, Amritsar offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Totally satisfied because of faculty, placements, and other facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of students get placed every year in this college. The highest salary package offered to students is 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, TCS, and some others visit the college every year. Around 80% of students got internships, and most roles offered in this course are CSA, CSR, CSE, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computer science labs, libraries, and Wi-Fi facilities are available here. The infrastructure is modern and fully furnished. The hostel provides fresh food to students. The college offers all medical, sports, and canteen facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure, but somewhere dissatisfied with the placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% students got placed during the placements drive. The highest package offered is around 5 LPA, the lowest is below 2 LPA and the average package secured is 3 LPA. For my course, recruiters are from banks life IDFC bank and Axis bank. According to my knowledge, around 15% students of my course got internships in various banks. The most commonly offered role is that of junior manager in a bank as B.Com is a banking degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is above average according to my opinion. The labs are up to the mark for practical classes. The Library is huge and well maintained with all the revised books and journals. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The hostel is great too with two students sharing a single room. The quality of food given by the mess is very delicious and made with proper hygiene. There is a gym for the hostel students. Medical facilities and first aid are also provided in the hostel for the students. There are various tournaments conducted for sports students and they are given concessions in the fee too.

faqs.question: Is DAV College, Amritsar a good college/Institute?

review_summary.college_name: DAV College, Amritsar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied.

content.Placements: 60-65% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and the average package offered in my course is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, Nestlé, and LT Foods Ltd (Dawat Price Group). 50-60% of students got internships in my course at Verka Milk Plant and various laboratories, gaining experience in quality checking. Top roles offered are Clinical Research Coordinator, Research Scientist, and Bio-Manufacturing.
content.Infrastructure: There is an abundance of facilities which are provided in our college. Bank book facilities are given, internships are provided and scholarships are also given to the students. There are well-established practical rooms, and all the equipment, instruments, and chemicals are available for the practical. Hostel facilities are very good. There is a big ground for sports and games. Medical facilities are excellent. Mess food is clean and nutritious.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Journalism & Mass Communication - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A great place to study and achieve skills for society.

content.Placements: There are numerous placements in many multinational companies, and around 40%-35% of students are really happy with this strength. Some are managers, some are employees, but many have opened their businesses. That's a great thing that entrepreneurs are coming out of college.
content.Infrastructure: Old look but great, with a lot of classrooms. There is Wi-Fi all over campus and separate hostels for boys and girls. There's a library too with two floors and a plethora of books that are issued on a card basis. The campus is divided into four parts across a road.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied because of faculty, placements, and other facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students get placed every year in this college. The highest salary package offered to students is 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, TCS, and some others visit the college every year. Around 80% of students got internships, and most roles offered in this course are CSA, CSR, CSE, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Computer science labs, libraries, and Wi-Fi facilities are available here. The infrastructure is modern and fully furnished. The hostel provides fresh food to students. The college offers all medical, sports, and canteen facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure, but somewhere dissatisfied with the placements.

content.Placements: Around 10% students got placed during the placements drive. The highest package offered is around 5 LPA, the lowest is below 2 LPA and the average package secured is 3 LPA. For my course, recruiters are from banks life IDFC bank and Axis bank. According to my knowledge, around 15% students of my course got internships in various banks. The most commonly offered role is that of junior manager in a bank as B.Com is a banking degree.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is above average according to my opinion. The labs are up to the mark for practical classes. The Library is huge and well maintained with all the revised books and journals. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The hostel is great too with two students sharing a single room. The quality of food given by the mess is very delicious and made with proper hygiene. There is a gym for the hostel students. Medical facilities and first aid are also provided in the hostel for the students. There are various tournaments conducted for sports students and they are given concessions in the fee too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Economics - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with good faculty members and good education.

content.Placements: Students with more than 85% in academics were eligible for placements. The average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. The top role offered was a clerk. Around 9 to 10 students got internships in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were average but computer labs were not up to mark for practicals. Food facility was not available in the canteen. It provided only tea.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were well-experienced and helpful. There were a lot of strikes every month. The course curriculum was not relevant to current industry needs.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: There is an abundance of facilities which are provided in our college. Bank book facilities are given, internships are provided and scholarships are also given to the students. There are well-established practical rooms, and all the equipment, instruments, and chemicals are available for the practical. Hostel facilities are very good. There is a big ground for sports and games. Medical facilities are excellent. Mess food is clean and nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: A great place to study and achieve skills for society.
reviews.review_text: Old look but great, with a lot of classrooms. There is Wi-Fi all over campus and separate hostels for boys and girls. There's a library too with two floors and a plethora of books that are issued on a card basis. The campus is divided into four parts across a road.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied because of faculty, placements, and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: Computer science labs, libraries, and Wi-Fi facilities are available here. The infrastructure is modern and fully furnished. The hostel provides fresh food to students. The college offers all medical, sports, and canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure, but somewhere dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average according to my opinion. The labs are up to the mark for practical classes. The Library is huge and well maintained with all the revised books and journals. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The hostel is great too with two students sharing a single room. The quality of food given by the mess is very delicious and made with proper hygiene. There is a gym for the hostel students. Medical facilities and first aid are also provided in the hostel for the stu...

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with good faculty members and good education.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were average but computer labs were not up to mark for practicals. Food facility was not available in the canteen. It provided only tea.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers of our college are very experienced.
reviews.review_text: This college does not have any gaming facilities. In classrooms, there are no air-conditioners. Some classrooms are very suffocated but they provide good classrooms for the new batch. During the summer session, the college mess becomes very suffocated. The campus is not huge.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for biotechnology with well-equipped labs in Amritsar.
reviews.review_text: Biotechnology is practical-based, so the college has well-equipped labs. It has one of the best biochemistry and microbiology labs with separate labs for plant tissue culture. Wi-Fi is unfortunately not available. A library is available 100 meters from campus. The hostel condition is not up to the mark. Rooms are in very bad condition.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good college at all.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very bad in classrooms. Classrooms are not well maintained at all. The benches for students are really bad. Disgusting condition of hostel rooms. Even though I haven't lived in hostel room of my college but I have friends who live in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied due to no activities and poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are not in good condition. The mess food is the worst and also the mess staff is rude. There is only one fan provided in the hostel room and two students share one room. Rooms do not have an aesthetic look and there is no ground for students to enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth spending Rs. 60,000 a year on BBA degree fees plus other facilities.
reviews.review_text: DAV College is equipped with all the required labs for each course. There are biology labs for biotechnology students, chemistry labs, physics labs, etc. Each individual department has its own computer lab, which is connected through a LAN. The library is double-storey and is situated a distance of 70 metres away from the college in a separate building. The Wi-Fi service is unfortunately unavailable at the campus for students. The hostel facilities at this college could be far better than those ...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of this college is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was good. There were many sports in our college like football, cricket, badminton, etc. They organised sports day that held in college and encourage students to participate in various games like cricket, running. The medical facilities of this college were good.

reviews.review_heading: Very impressed by the teaching quality and placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: Basically, the infrastructure and facilities are almost very great in our college and department. The department has its own Wi-Fi and also great labs where we do our practical work. The classrooms are good and clean. A library is available. I don't stay in the hostel because I am a day scholar, and I live nearby. Therefore, I can't say much about it. According to some of my friends, the hostel and mess are quite fine. Sports and games are good. Great players came from our college who earned a g...

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend others if they are local to this place, because I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories were good in this college. The classrooms were big and airy. Students will get a vast variety of books and novels in the library. The main campus was divided into various sub-campuses so if students were looking for a big large campus with a beautiful garden then they were at the wrong place.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, good in studies and teachers.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the classrooms and gallery were ventilated but furniture. The electric appliances were outdated. Small and separate canteen for boys and girls. Outside college, there were many options for eating and sitting. The hostel was not good. Medical facilities were not proper. The sports and games were average.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college in Amritsar, but it is good for students who are interested in studies.
reviews.review_text: It has a great infrastructure and well-built design along with a modern facility. Moreover, labs are student-friendly. Wi-Fi is available in the library and classrooms. Mess food is like home food made by the mother, and it is so mouth-watering. Spring-roll is the best.

college_info.college_name: Pratap University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: Pratap University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. MBA and BTech students are placed in top companies such as SIS Cash Services (P) Ltd. (SIS Prosegur), Genpact, JBM Group, and others. BTech students can become Engineers, Data Analysts, Web Developers, Software Developers, Software Engineers, AI Engineers, Data Scientists, or can go for other job opportunities. The university teaches BTech students to build, test, and upgrade various softwares and computer applications. Through the MBA course, the university tries to transform the students into effective administrators and leaders that are equipped to face several challenges of the corporate world. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

faqs.answer: A:    The companies that were part of Pratap University Jaipur placements 2023 are yet to be disclosed. Some of the leading companies that participated in recent years’ drives are mentioned below:Pratap University Placements: Top RecruitersSIS Cash Services (P) Ltd. (SIS Prosegur)Radico KhaitanInterglobe TechnologiesAonDaffodil SoftwareGenpactBirlasoftSopra SteriaJBM GroupAppirio
faqs.question: Who were the recruiters during Pratap University placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The placement cell of the university coordinates with students and assures placement at a reputed company within six months of graduating. There's also an Employability Enhancement and Competency Development Program organized by the university as an Audit Course, which every student has to take mandatorily. Pratap University's placement cell has strong professional networks with several companies across diverse networks.
faqs.question: Is Pratap University good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    According to unofficial online sources, Pratap University, Jaipur alumni primarily work in the Engineering sector with a 39% share. The below pie chart illustrates the detailed sector-wise distribution of alumni along with the percentage involved:
faqs.question: Where do Pratap University alumni work?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the University has a dedicated placement cell that has tied up with prominent corporate joints. From time to time, the Pratap University placement cell organises training sessions such as Personality Development and Soft Skill training. Further, the University also has an Entrepreneurship cell that enhances the creativity skill among the students and helps them choose the best option.
faqs.question: Does Pratap University Jaipur offer campus placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Pratap University is a state university situated at jaipur, Rajasthan. As it is a state university so there is some state qouta. In B.Tech. the state qouta is 40 percent. However, there are many reservation seats present in Pratap University, like defense quota, Kashmir migrant quota, ews quota, scheduled caste, scheduled tribe quota.
faqs.question: Are there any seat reservations at Pratap University?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12. Candidates need to pass a minimum of graduation for PG programmes. Below is Pratap University eligibility criteria for popular courses:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)MBAGraduation in any stream (BA, BSc, BCom, BTech) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BBAClass 12 with at least 48% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BCAClass 12 with at least 48% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)MCABSc (Mathematics Group) or BSc (IT) or BSc (CS) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BPharmClass 12 with PCB/ PCM with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Pratap University?

faqs.answer: A:    Pratap University eligibility requirements varies course-wise. However, the minimum aggregate required for UG courses ranges between 45%-50% aggregate. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST candidates. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can easily get admission in Pratap University courses.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to Pratap University with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Pratap University fee varies course-wise. Candidates need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Below is Pratap University fee for top courses:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeMTechINR 2.1 lakhMBAINR 3 lakhBScINR 1.5 - INR 1.6 lakhBPharmINR 4.8 lakhMCAINR 1.4 lakh - INR 2.4 lakh

review_content.General: Till date, neither any good canteen has opened in this university nor any good food has been found in the mess. The quality of the pulses that were fed to us in the hostel mess was exactly like the food we got in jail. The teachers of the university were not at all professionals, they were just pass out students from some college university who came to this university only to get experience, he was not worried about our future at all. He said, I have received my salary, it doesn't matter to me whether you pass or fails. I have had a very bad experience in this university. The owner of this university never came to see the university, he used to run the university from a distance.

review_content.Placements: Minimum 12th passout students are eligible for BCA or any other course. The average package is 16LPA and the lowest average package is 3LPA. Google, Reliance, etc. IT Companies TOP Roles offered BCA course & Medical course, business course, librarian course etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Great infrastructure, all facilities available like class room, canteen, Wi-Fi, library, playground. Also classrooms is too good, and canteen. Some of the facilities include well ventilated classrooms, recreational areas, hostel facility for boys and girls, indoor and outdoor games, stocked library.

The university works to create a positive environment for students and supports them as they make plans for a better future. The goal of the university is to advance skill-based education for increased effectiveness and better learnin

course_faqs.answer: Pratap University offers two-year MBA course spread across four semesters. Aspirants who have completed graduation in any stream (BA, BSc, BCom, BTech) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates) can apply for MBA course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with Pratap University currently because of its faculty and placements.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students are placed in my course. The highest salary package offered was 1.2 crore per annum, the average salary package offered was 8 LPA. And the lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Infosys, TCS, Bosch, Volkswagen, and Deutsche Bank. Almost 85% of students secured internships at Deutsche Bank, HCL Tech, and TCS. Management Trainee, Equity Analyst, Data Analyst, and Investment Banker are top roles offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, hostel, indoor games, and many essential facilities are provided in the college. Hostel food is quite nice compared to others, and 24/7 medical facilities are available. However, there is no sports coach. Students cannot play sports like basketball or cricket due to the lack of a coach.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Students are playing with their future in this university by taking admission.

content.Placements: Till the time I studied in this university, no one came for placement. Even in this university, the university never took us on industrial visit, whereas my other friends study in UPTU colleges, their college people used to take them for training from 2 year but till date this has not happened in our place. We students were just pressurized in the university that if talk too much we will fails.
content.Infrastructure: Till date, neither any good canteen has opened in this university nor any good food has been found in the mess. The quality of the pulses that were fed to us in the hostel mess was exactly like the food we got in jail. The teachers of the university were not at all professionals, they were just pass out students from some college university who came to this university only to get experience, he was not worried about our future at all. He said, I have received my salary, it doesn't matter to me whether you pass or fails. I have had a very bad experience in this university. The owner of this university never came to see the university, he used to run the university from a distance.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Pratap University Rajasthan Jaipur .

content.Placements: Minimum 12th passout students are eligible for BCA or any other course. The average package is 16LPA and the lowest average package is 3LPA. Google, Reliance, etc. IT Companies TOP Roles offered BCA course & Medical course, business course, librarian course etc.
content.Infrastructure: Great infrastructure, all facilities available like class room, canteen, Wi-Fi, library, playground. Also classrooms is too good, and canteen. Some of the facilities include well ventilated classrooms, recreational areas, hostel facility for boys and girls, indoor and outdoor games, stocked library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: In this college, there was no companies visit to hire students. The worst place to get admission for engineering. The worst place to build students' careers, and the location was also not good. The placements had no name or even a single company does not come for asking also.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was not good. The facility was not good, and the food served was very dirty, and the infrastructure was also not good. Bed was broken, and there were no good things in the rooms. The condition of room was also not good, and water condition was also not good. The washrooms were not clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for B.Pharma students, and the placements in 2021 were good.

content.Placements: The college provides good placement opportunities. More than 20 medical industries come here every year. The teachers work hard for students to make them get selected for the interview. The average package ranges from 3 to 6 LPA. If you are good at academics, then you will surely get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The camps of Pratap University is good and has good infrastructure. Every department has practical laboratories separately. The course is well designed according to semesters. The ratio of practicals and theory is good.

admission_overview.college_name: Pratap University Course Admissions: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Pratap University admissionis primarilymerit-based. Candidates who have qualified any of the national-level entrance exam can also take admission based on their score. The university offers various courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels through eight departments.Pratap Universityoffers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management,Pharmacy, Education, etc. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of PU.

Pratap University offers courses in full-time mode. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the university website for their preferred course. Find below the keyPratap University admissionhighlights:
Particulars
Pratap University Admission Highlights 2024
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2024
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Pratap University admissionsare based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are popularPratap University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Check out otherPratap University Courses

Pratap University admissions begin with the opening of the registration portal. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for the course of their choice. Below is step-wise admission process for Pratap University:
STEP 1: Pratap University Application Process
The mode of application is online. Candidates can register with their personal, academic and other details. Aspirants also need to upload scanned documents to complete the application process.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Once the registration is over, aspirants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates with a valid score in any of the national entrance exam can also get admission. The university evaluates the applications of the candidates for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Selected candidates need to upload the specified documents for verification. After uploading the documents, the prescribed admission fee needs to be paid for confirmed admission. The admission fee can be paid through any valid online process. Candidates may also add their hostel/ accommodation & transportation fee while making payment. After payment, admission is considered confirmed
Check out more details in the below video:

headings.text: Steps for Pratap University Admission Process 2024

courses_data.name: Pratap University BTech Admission
courses_data.description: Pratap University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science Engineering,Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for BTech programme. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to BTech programmes. The selection for BTech is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants withJEE Mainor any other national-level entrance exam score can also get admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech in various specialisations:Computer Science EngineeringCivil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringElectronic & Communication EngineeringElectrical Engineering

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in BTech at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Candidates are selected for BTech admission at Pratap University based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates with a valid JEE Main or any other Engineering entrance exam score can get admission in BTech. Aspirants need to come for document verification after selection. Aspirants need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for Pratap University BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

courses_data.name: Pratap University MBA Admission
courses_data.description: Pratap University offers two-year MBA course divided into four semesters. Aspirants who have completed graduation in any stream (BA, BSc, BCom, BTech) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates) can apply for MBA course. Admission to Pratap University MBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants with a valid CAT, MAT or any other Management entrance exam score can also get admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of graduation in any stream (BA, BSc, BCom, BTech) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Pratap University MBA programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MBA at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University selects candidates for MBA based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates with a valid CAT, MAT or any other Management entrance exam scores can also get admission. Selected candidates are then called for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University offers two-year MBA course spread across four semesters. Aspirants who have completed graduation in any stream (BA, BSc, BCom, BTech) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates) can apply for MBA course.

faqs.question: How costly is Pratap University?
faqs.answer: At Pratap University It totally depends on the course you are pursuing. There are many courses that are offered in the university like MBA, BE/Btech, and BCA/MCAThe current tuition fees of different programs are-MBA- INR 3 lakhBE/Btech -INR 5.6 lakhBCA- INR 2.5 lakh

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Pratap University with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Pratap University eligibility requirements varies course-wise. However, the minimum aggregate required for UG courses ranges between 45%-50% aggregate. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST candidates. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can easily get admission in Pratap University courses.

faqs.question: Can I join Pratap University directly?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to go step-wise to get admission in Pratap University. Aspirants first need to check the eligibility criteria and apply for the preferred programme. In case, aspirants have an entrance exam score, they can get admission based on it. The university also selects candidates based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12. Candidates need to pass a minimum of graduation for PG programmes. Below is Pratap University eligibility criteria for popular courses:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)MBAGraduation in any stream (BA, BSc, BCom, BTech) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BBAClass 12 with at least 48% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BCAClass 12 with at least 48% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)MCABSc (Mathematics Group) or BSc (IT) or BSc (CS) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BPharmClass 12 with PCB/ PCM with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)

faqs.question: Are there any seat reservations at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University is a state university situated at jaipur, Rajasthan. As it is a state university so there is some state qouta. In B.Tech. the state qouta is 40 percent. However, there are many reservation seats present in Pratap University, like defense quota, Kashmir migrant quota, ews quota, scheduled caste, scheduled tribe quota.

placement_report.college_name: Pratap University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Pratap University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Pratap University has a proactive placement cell with a strong professional network across diverse sectors. It actively coordinates with students and ensures placement in reputed companies within six months of completing the course. In addition to this, the Pratap University Jaipur placement cell has added ‘ Employability Enhancement and Competency Development ’ as a part of the curriculum. The cell organizes corporate customised programmes and offers in-house internships to deserving students.

faqs.question: Is Pratap University good for placements?
faqs.answer: The placement cell of the university coordinates with students and assures placement at a reputed company within six months of graduating. There's also an Employability Enhancement and Competency Development Program organized by the university as an Audit Course, which every student has to take mandatorily. Pratap University's placement cell has strong professional networks with several companies across diverse networks.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: After successfully completing the course, an MBA candidate has a broad range of employment options and room for advancement. A few are open for specialisation, some of which include finance, logistics, automobile, marketing, and human resource management.The candidate has an opportunity for a job at any level of management depending on the interest and specialisation of the MBA candidate, a variety of campus placement drives are also a golden opportunity for the best placement in any of the aforementioned working areas. The average package could be expected to lie around INR 3 LPA- INR 5 LPA. The highest package could lie around INR 6LPA –INR 7 LPA. Top recruiters are VI!, Microsoft, Larsen Tourbo, Indusinsight, Mahindra Rise etc.

faqs.question: Which are the top companies that take part of the placement drive at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University has tie-ups with big companies like Oracle and Microsoft for placement of the students, Companies like Genpact, JBM, Birla Soft, HCL Technologies, Betasoft, Huawei, Su-Kam, Interglobe Technologies, etc. come as recruiters in the University.

hostel.description: Pratap University offers comprehensive hostel facilities for boys and girls separately within the University Campus.Caring wardens and a vigilant security ensures a pleasant stay allowing students to focus on academics. The air-conditioned residential apartment suites consist of single rooms with an attached bathroom and sitting lounge equipped with sofa, cable TV and refrigerator. Normal Non-A/C and AC hostel rooms are also available. The life in hostels enables students to spend ample time in the institutes, utilize library and other facilities to ensure they develop academically and acquire the necessary skills that can be obtained only through experience.

library.description: University's Central library is fully automated & well stocked with more than 35 thousand books which provides access to a large spectrum of text and reference books of Indian and foreign authors, besides e-journals, a number of journals, magazines, periodicals, information bulletins and news papers. The Central Library is presently headed by Mr. Suraj Pal, Department of Library Science.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Mini Golf

But there is no space for playing indoor game. Hostel facilities is good but in this technical world they should provide the Wi-Fi connection in every floor of hostle for the students. This will be really helpful for upcoming candidates.

reviews.review_heading: Pratap University-Jaipur is a good college.

reviews.review_heading: Join the Pratap University if you want to bunk all the class.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is still under construction. One building is completed and more than 5 out 6 buildings are still pending for the last 5 years. The management has not much money so that they can complete it. Still, the canteen is not completed since the last 5 years. There is also not a proper playground.

There was only theoretical knowledge provided and no practical knowledge. I didn't do any practicals in college until the full tenure. We had to grab the knowledge from outside. I did not enjoy my college life well.

highlights.summary:
The MAT 2026 exam result for admission to the MBA course for the CBT and the PBT modes will be announced soon.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Institute of Business Management and Research(IBMR KOLKATA) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time and Part Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as BCA and BBA. Whereas, at PG level, Institute of Business Management and Research(IBMR KOLKATA) offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MHA. Institute of Business Management and Research(IBMR KOLKATA) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,50,000 to 3,95,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are truly awesome.

review_content.Placements: Most of the time, MBA course students are offered near about 8 Lacs to 9 Lacs per year. Almost 70 percent of students got placements through our college. I don't have an exact idea about the internship programme but as per the past records, near about 40 percent of students got internship offers during their 3-year course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a lovely infrastructure for real. Inside our college, there are absolutely beautiful classrooms, well maintained digital rooms for studies, library is so much customized including the book stock. There are free Wi-Fi facilities for students and teachers both. College hostel is available with every kind of food facilities & medical also.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Program in Financial Services - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Completely satisfied with the amount of exposure in the real market we get through this RMM course.

review_content.Placements: I am from ITM Business School, Navi Mumbai and currently pursuing my PGDM degree in Retail Management and Marketing, regarding the placements, until now all the students have been placed whether by college or independently. As of our seniors the highest package offered was of 12LPA and the lowest was around 6.5LPA so the average would fall around 8.5-9 LPA. For our course we had recruitments from Reckitt Benckiser, Bisleri, Future group, TATA Croma etc. Our college gives us various opportunities as it brings many dignified companies to our campus for our placements. reviews_list.review_title: Strong infrastructure and decent placement, but teaching quality needs improvements at DG Vaishnav.

review_content.Placements: At DG Vaishnav College, placements for MBA students show roughly 35–40 percent getting job offers, with packages ranging from 2 LPA to 9.45 LPA and an average of 3.4 LPA, top recruiters include Infosys, Deloitte, Cognizant, and EY, nearly 50 percent secure internships, and roles offered include business associate, analyst, sales, and finance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department offers spacious classrooms, well-equipped computer labs, campus Wi-Fi, and a rich library; hostel facilities are clean with basic amenities, mess and canteen food is average but hygienic, medical support is available, and sports facilities and games are adequate.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A college with good infrastructure and academics but placements need more company diversity.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is 70 percent, with good packages in well-known companies, and top recruiting companies include HDFC Bank, EY, Times of India, Societe Generale, etc., offering roles like management trainee, financial analyst, HR executive, sales manager, and customer relations, with the highest package at 10 LPA, the lowest at 4.25 LPA, and an average of 5.5 LPA, while 100 percent of students got internships in companies like EY, Ashok Leyland, Hilton, and Royal Enfield.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a separate library for MBA students, easily accessible for reference and academics, classrooms are well-furnished with proper seating and atmosphere, hostels have good facilities with all basic necessities, labs are highly active with good internet connection, and students can access them anytime for research and project purposes.

content.Placements: Almost everyone gets placed by the completion of the course. The highest package offered was around 14 Lacs per annum, and the lowest package would be around 3 to 4 Lacs per annum. Jaro Education, ey, Accenture, TCS, and HCL are the top companies. college_info.college_name: School of Business Management and Commerce, MVN University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for School of Business Management and Commerce, MVN University admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

placements.overview: School of Business Management and Commerce, MVN University is a private institute, established in 2012 in Palwal, Haryana. School of Business Management and Commerce, MVN University offers a total of 3 courses at UG and PG levels. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM, B.Com and BBA in Full Time mode. School of Business Management and Commerce, MVN University fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,05,000 to 1,50,000. It offers courses, in streams such as Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. As per the recent School of Business Management and Commerce, MVN University placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 2,82,000. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing college life at mvn.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 100% of the students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Escort, Truebill, Ekart and Ola were pleasant companies to work for. All students are required to take up internships to gain industry experience for a period of 3 to 4 weeks in a good year, in Escort, etc. Business development associate HR associate, sales and marketing associate were the roles which were provided.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was great. Wi-Fi enabled campuses. Laboratory, air-conditioned classrooms, and library there. The hostel was neat with good food. Medical facilities were also provided. With coach and gym, equipment for sports and games is also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure, facilities, and supportive staff members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Tata, Mount Talent Consulting, Innodata, etc. Almost 80% of students got internships in Airtel and Sharekhan. Top roles were offered for marketing, consulting, and many departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our university was very good. Classrooms, laboratories, and a library were well-maintained. The hostel was good and had many facilities for students. The food served was not tasty. The food served in the mess and canteen was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good. It provides supportive teachers, fine placements, and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 100% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Escort, Truebill, Ekart, and Ola. Every student should go for internships for their industry experience for 3 or 4 weeks in a good year, in Escort, etc. Business development associate HR associate, sales and marketing associate were the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very impressive. Wi-Fi was enabled on the campus. It provides laboratories, air-conditioners classroom, and a library. The hostel was clean with good quality food. The medical facilities were also provided. Sports and games equipment provided with trainer and gym was also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of School of Business Management and Commerce, MVN University.

review_content.Placements: If students have good communication skills and good command of English then only there is the possibility of getting placements, but students would encounter 2 to 5 companies coming for recruiting, and eventually, those are also not good. The average salary offered ranges from Rs 20,000 to Rs 25,000. I got placed at GuruQ and qualify GD-PI over 2-3 companies with the help of Ritu Mughal mam
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is good. Hostels facilities are also good not to worry about the infrastructure of this university. Laboratories are updated. The canteen is also good. Sports facilities are there. Medicinal facilities are there, and the gym is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of Faculty, Placements and how management treat students.

review_content.Placements: Mostly Call Centers and small companies come for placement. What I didn't like is they mix the student's at the time of placement for e. g. Students of B.Tech are mixed with MBA to increase strength. Associate level roles are mostly offered. For Management student's only marketing companies and call Centers come.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi AC classrooms (AC starts for 4 months only) No medical Facilities Bad quality of food in Canteen Hostel rooms are average. Classrooms of First year students are good for 2nd, 3rd, 4th classrooms changed. For sport's (Cricket, Table Tennis, Carrom).

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: MVN is the right place to study.

review_content.Placements: This is the best university because the placements are very much good. 100% placements are there. Last time, minimum 20 to 25 companies were invited for placements. They start their placement sessions in 5th semester, and till the last date, they try to place every child.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is also very good. They have AC rooms, computer labs, 4 grounds to play and sit. There is a big canteen, Wi-Fi and also separate restrooms for girls common rooms on every floor. They have neat and clean washrooms. Proper security is there and also have parking space for 2 or 4 wheelers.

faqs.answer: A:    SMIT - Saroj Mohan Institute of Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, BBA, BHM, BCA, After 10th Diploma, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at SMIT - Saroj Mohan Institute of Technology are Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Hospital / Healthcare Management.

faqs.question: Which courses does SMIT - Saroj Mohan Institute of Technology offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of SMIT - Saroj Mohan Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Out of 60 students, a minimum of 20 students got placed until now from our course. The highest salary package offered here was 8 LPA. Many top-rated companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, etc., visit here for placements. But the recruitment is very low this year due to the COVID-19 pandemic. However, in other years, they provided very good placements. But the student coordinator is not helpful at all, and he doesn't do anything and just forwards emails.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of the food served here is very low. However, other facilities are good like Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are very well maintained, and some equipment in the communication lab is outdated. However, the computer lab is well maintained. The bathroom in the lady's hostel is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: I have the best college life with good people, helpful teachers and great placements.

review_content.Placements: When I passed out from our college, the situation of the software market was not good, so I did not get placed. Some of our friends got placed. Recruiting companies were TCS, CTS, Accenture, etc. Maybe 30-35% of the students got an internship in computer science and engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The space of our campus is very big. There are 5 hostels, of which 3 for boys and two for girls. Classrooms are quite big, and there are separate buildings for labs and a library. There are two big playgrounds, of which one is for cricket and football, and another is for volleyball and badminton. There is a huge canteen, and the food is served for 24 hours. When I was passed out from this college, people have not used much Wi-Fi.

review_summary.college_name: SMIT - Saroj Mohan Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college with average placements.

content.Placements: Placements can be rated 7 out of 10. For placements, 45 out of 60 students got placed in campus placements. TVs, CTS, Wipro, Accenture, L&T Infotech, etc., are the big companies that came for campus placements. Overall, the placements are quite good. From the 7th semester, students get opportunities from various companies organized by the college. The highest package offered is 5 Lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Every college has bad and good aspects. Our college is no different. It's the first private college in West Bengal. The best part of this college is the faculty. Most of them are friendly with students. They will help you with your progress. Placements are a major concern here. Only the best students get the best placement opportunities. Others just participate in placements. There are many ways to get into this college, like WBJEE, merit base, management quota etc. I took admission in August 2017. The hostel has 24-hours electricity and water facilities. The food is awesome. The hostel is on campus. So, it is easier to access. 24-hours Wi-Fi is available. There are many options for PG and mess outside the campus. The total fee is 60,000 per year. The hostel fee is 30,000.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SMIT is like my second home and it is a lovely place.

content.Placements: Many students get placed through our college. Students prefer government job preparations after pursuing the course. Maximum students are placed in companies like TCS, and Wipro. The average salary package offered is 3.6 LPA. People got jobs in the data entry and software section.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has various modern labs and equipments. We have quality hostel, a gym and other sports and cultural groups and societies.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are very friendly. They have a lot of knowledge in their sectors. The computer science department is the most reputed department of our college. The course is well planned and regular basic training occurs on campus. Education excursions happened every semester. We have internal and semester exams. The difficulty of the exam is medium. The pass percentage is more than 90%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of SMIT - Saroj Mohan Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Out of 60 students, a minimum of 20 students got placed until now from our course. The highest salary package offered here was 8 LPA. Many top-rated companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, etc., visit here for placements. But the recruitment is very low this year due to the COVID-19 pandemic. However, in other years, they provided very good placements. But the student coordinator is not helpful at all, and he doesn't do anything and just forwards emails.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the food served here is very low. However, other facilities are good like Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are very well maintained, and some equipment in the communication lab is outdated. However, the computer lab is well maintained. The bathroom in the lady's hostel is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: I have the best college life with good people, helpful teachers and great placements.

content.Placements: When I passed out from our college, the situation of the software market was not good, so I did not get placed. Some of our friends got placed. Recruiting companies were TCS, CTS, Accenture, etc. Maybe 30-35% of the students got an internship in computer science and engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The space of our campus is very big. There are 5 hostels, of which 3 for boys and two for girls. Classrooms are quite big, and there are separate buildings for labs and a library. There are two big playgrounds, of which one is for cricket and football, and another is for volleyball and badminton. There is a huge canteen, and the food is served for 24 hours. When I was passed out from this college, people have not used much Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I have a wonderful experience because of our teachers and campus.

content.Placements: Around 40% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 9 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Intel, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. In our course, top roles are offered in the research and development department. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Around 30% of the students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college has a gym, a unisex canteen, labs for all departments and huge libraries with air-conditioners and biometric machine. The hostel has 4 buildings, and every building is allocated for every year students. They have one football ground and a badminton court. The quality of the food served is very good. The campus has 24x7 ambulance facilities.

reviews.review_heading: SMIT needs to work on its placements. Otherwise, it's a pretty good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is neither too bad nor too good. Wi-Fi is available all over the college campus. We have a pretty huge library, and mostly we collect books from there. Classrooms are average. There is a huge ground in college for different types of sports. Our college has it's own canteen, but food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college with a budget course.
reviews.review_text: It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. It has a gym, a unisex canteen, labs for all departments, a huge library with air-conditioner. The hostel has 4 buildings, each for an individual year with one football ground and badminton court. The quality of the food served in the canteen is very good. reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are in good conditions, and it is huge compared to the other college classrooms. The college provides free Wi-Fi facility throughout the campus. The library and reading room are available where students can read the books or can do some assignments, etc. Hostel facility is good, and especially the women's hostel is very good. Quality of the food in the canteen is good. Only first aid facility is available for medical purpose. An ambulance is also available for any emergency co...

reviews.review_heading: College is good, but placements are not so good.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like computer labs, huge classrooms, huge library, huge playground, Wi-Fi, etc., but the Wi-Fi facility is not good. Hostel quality is not good. Quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very good. Medical facilities are good, and a huge playground available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Saroj Mohan Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: There is a digital library. Apart from books, one can use the internet for more study material. There is a gym facility, and different games available for students now. I don't have any idea about the hostel as I wasn't part of the hostel. For medical emergencies, an ambulance is available 24x7 at the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Not a very satisfying campus.
reviews.review_text: There is no sport place. No gym. No common canteen. The canteen is available only for hostel students. And the food available is very bad and taste very bad. No separate medical place for an emergency within the campus. One common library. Which is ordinary. And the labs are good.

reviews.review_heading: Take admission in SMIT and experience competitive life and learning through application.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Labs were excellent. Teachers and faculty members were very cooperative. Students work hard during project work. Faculty members provide us with many projects from which we can get extra knowledge so that we can utilise it in our higher studies.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in 2019 have been good. This is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. However, the classrooms and labs are excellent. The medical facility is provided if there is an emergency. The college also organises an annual sports events. They also conduct cricket and football tournaments for the students to have fun. Our college also has a playground for all students.

reviews.review_heading: My college SMIT, a good college for admission.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. Labs are well decorated with instruments. For sports there is a football ground in our campus and total 4 badmintoncourts are there. Medical facilities is always there in our campus. Hostels are also available in our campus and hostel rooms are good for lodging but foods for hostellers are very poor.

reviews.review_heading: SMIT - once great, now gone.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is OKish. Labs are all equipped but can be more better. Computer labs has possibilities of improvement also. The mechanical workshops are the only which are well-equipped and better than the rest. Library is not good. Canteen food is what you can expect from a usual Indian college canteen.

review_summary.college_name: VIT-AP School of Business Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and lovely campus.

content.Placements: Approximately 85% of people in this course are placed. The highest package on VITAP is 63 lakh, and the average package is around 7.3 lakh. The top recruiting companies for this course are Deloitte, Google, Amazon, and Microsoft. 90% of the students get internships at different companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good and it is also a lovely campus. We have a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility and power supply. You have theory and lab classes that are well furnished. Very spacious library and good classrooms. There are ATMs, medical centres and ambulances too. The food in the hostel mess is a bit bad but the canteen has good food, and the sports facility is super good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of VIT Andhra Pradesh university BBA (VSB).

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed, and INR 15 lacs is the highest package, and the average is like INR 5 lacs. TCS and Microsoft are major recruiters; almost everyone gets an internship; and BBA is the most highly rated course these days. People get placed in HR roles as managers and accountants.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are quite good, classrooms are spacious, neat, and clean, and the library has fully centralized air conditioning, large types of books, automatic book droppers, etc. And sports facilities are good, with separate places for every sport.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It has good environment with experienced faculty and a separate hostel with high security.

The top recruiters are Microsoft, Amazon, JPMorgan, Chase & Co., and Deloitte. About 912 students were chosen for summer internships, with a total of 342 in PayPal. They have a CDC office to help with different opportunities in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Hostel rooms have two or four beds with attached bathrooms. Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food are available.

Amazon, Dell, eBay, Hitachi, Indian Oil, Intel, and Microsoft are the top recruiting companies. Around 90% of students get internships. Technical and management are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: It provides Wi-Fi, a central air-conditioner, the best laboratories, a library, and digital classrooms. All the activities students have in this college. All the best infrastructure in India and is the best private university in India. It is 2nd best private university in India and has the best exam system.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: VIT Andhra Pradesh University Review.

content.Placements: Above 70 percent of students will be placed in VIT Andhra Pradesh University. The highest package is 63 LPA, the lowest package is undisclosed, and the average package is 20 LPA. Microsoft, Amazon, and Infosys are the top recruiting companies. A minimum CGPA of 8 is required to get placed. They specialize in software development and web design.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of VIT Andhra Pradesh University is excellent, with three academic blocks, one library, 5 men's hostels, and 2 ladies hostels. The laboratories are well-equipped with updated computers. Each student is provided with a Wi-Fi password for both the hostel and university.

admission_process.title: VIT-AP School of Business Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: TheVIT-AP School of Business admission processincludes application followed by selection and admission confirmation. Interested candidates can go through the following steps for more details aroundVIT-AP School of Business admissions:
Application Process

VIT-AP School of Business application process is online. Candidates can apply online on the college's official website for their desired UG programmes, i.e., BBA and BCom. The application dates are available on the website.
Selection Rounds

VIT-AP School of Business admissions are both entrance and merit-based for BCom course. However, students must qualify for the college-level Management Test conducted for BBA programme. Moreover, the shortlisted students must also appear for a PI round to secure a seat in BBA and BCom programme. For MBA admissions, students have to either appear for VITBEE or have a valid score in CAT/ XAT/ MAT. Those with high CAT scores may get preference for early admission. Work experience will be considered an added advantage.
Final Admission

At last, the shortlisted candidates must participate in the counselling process for the final seat allotment. Later, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of theVIT-AP School of Business feeto confirm their admission.
Important Documents
lists: Marksheets of all attempts of qualifying exam

faqs.question: Does VIT-AP School of Business offer MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, VIT-AP School of Business does offer MBA course in full-time mode. The duration of the course is two years. Students have to appear for VITBEE/ CAT/ XAT/ MAT to get admission in the programme

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by VIT-AP School of Business for MBA?
faqs.answer: For VIT-AP School of Business MBA admissions, students are selected on an entrance basis. The institute accepts following exams for shortlisting:VITBEE 2026CATXATMAT

faqs.question: Can I get a refund of VIT-AP MBA fees if I withdraw from the course or cancel my admission?
faqs.answer: No, VIT-AP MBA fees is non-refundable if the candidates decide to cancel their admission after paying the admission fees or withdrawing from the MBA course.The only fee that is refundable at VIT-AP is the caution deposit of INR 3,000 which is refunded if the candidate finishes the MBA course at the institute. The caution deposit is refunded before the commencement of the final examination for the VIT-AP MBA course.

faqs.question: Do I require a UG level business degree to apply for the MBA course at VIT-AP?
faqs.answer: No, candidates who wish to apply for the MBA course at VIT-AP are not required to have a UG-level business degree. The MBA admissions at VIT-AP are open to all candidates who can present a valid degree from a recognised institute that had a minimum duration of three years. The discipline and stream of the UG level degree does not matter.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BCom course at VIT-AP School of Business?
faqs.answer: VIT-AP School of Business admission process for the BCom course is based on merit, calculated based on candidates' scores in Class 12.Direct admission to the BCom programme is not availableas per the admission guidelinesof the university.Candidates must qualify for the merit, followed by PItoget admission to the BCom course.Candidates have to registerthemselves online on the official websiteof the universityto fill out the application forms.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admissions to BCom course at VIT-AP School of Business?
faqs.answer: VIT-AP School of Business offers a BCom course at the UG level for the duration of three years. Candidates who have passed pre-university/higher secondary/Class 12 examinations or equivalent from any recognised board or council in any discipline with at least 55%. Admission to the BCom course is based on merit, which is evaluated on the basis of candidates' achieved scores in their last qualifying examination. Further, candidates are required to appear in PI.

faqs.question: Does VIT-AP School of Business offer BCom courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, VIT-AP School of Business does offer a BCom (Hons) course in Finance. The duration of the programme is three years, which is divided into six semesters and offered in full-time mode. The basic eligibility criteria required by the institute to get admissions into BCom courses is that candidates must complete their Class 12 with an aggregate of 55%. The school only offers a BCom course in one specialisation i.e., finance.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to VIT-AP School of Business?
faqs.answer: To get admission to  VIT-AP School of Business, students need to go through a multi-step admission process. Admissions to all the UG and PG courses are both merit and entrance-based. Students can follow the below admission criteria for  VIT-AP School of Business course admissions:Application Process:VIT-AP School of Business application process is online. Candidates can apply online on the college's official website for their desired UG programmes, i.e., BBA and BCom.Selection Rounds:VIT-AP School of Business admissions are completely merit-based for BCom course. However, students must qualify for the college-levelManagement Testconducted for BBA programme. Moreover, the shortlisted students must also appear for a PI round to secure a seat in BBA and BCom programme.Final Admission:At last, the shortlisted candidates must participate in the counselling process for the final seat allotment. Later, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of the course fee to confirm their admiss

faqs.question: What are the important documents required during VIT-AP School of Business admissions?
faqs.answer: During VIT-AP School of Business admissions, students have to keep some original and copies of important documents ready for verification. The list is as below:Marksheets of all attempts of qualifying examTC/ School Leaving CertificateMigration CertificateAffidavit by Parent - signed & notarisedSigned & Notarised hostel affidavitCertificate of Physical FitnessUndertaking FormTwo recent passport-size colour photosProvisional Admission LetterEntrance exam scorecard - if applicableNativity Certificate - if applicable

faqs.question: Is CUET UG compulsory for admissions to BCom course at VIT-AP School of Business?
faqs.answer: No, CUET UG is not compulsory for admissions to the BCom course at VIT-AP School of Business, VIT-AP University. As per the information available on the official website of the university, the school does not accept the scores of CUET UG for admissions to the BCom course. Moreover, for admissions to the BCom course, candidates must have passed pre-university/higher secondary/Class 12 examinations or equivalent from any recognised board or council in any discipline with at least 55%.Admission to the BCom course is based on merit, which is evaluated on the basis of candidates' achieved scores in their last qualifying examination. Further, candidates are required to appear in PI.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund of the BBA fees at VIT-AP if I cancel my admission or withdraw from the course?
faqs.answer: No, the candidates who choose to withdraw or cancel their admission from the BBA course are refunded any fees paid for the course. This rule also applies for provisional admissions which are canceled due to failure of fulfilling the eligibilty criteria. The only fees which is refunded is the caution deposit at the end of the VIT-AP BBA course.

hostel_campus.college_name: VIT-AP School of Business Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and lovely campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good and it is also a lovely campus. We have a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility and power supply. You have theory and lab classes that are well furnished. Very spacious library and good classrooms. There are ATMs, medical centres and ambulances too. The food in the hostel mess is a bit bad but the canteen has good food, and the sports facility is super good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VIT Andhra Pradesh university BBA (VSB).
reviews.review_text: Labs are quite good, classrooms are spacious, neat, and clean, and the library has fully centralized air conditioning, large types of books, automatic book droppers, etc. And sports facilities are good, with separate places for every sport.

reviews.review_heading: It has good environment with experienced faculty and a separate hostel with high security.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Hostel rooms have two or four beds with attached bathrooms. Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VIT-AP School of Business, VIT-AP University.
reviews.review_text: It provides Wi-Fi, a central air-conditioner, the best laboratories, a library, and digital classrooms. All the activities students have in this college. All the best infrastructure in India and is the best private university in India. It is 2nd best private university in India and has the best exam system.

reviews.review_heading: VIT Andhra Pradesh University Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of VIT Andhra Pradesh University is excellent, with three academic blocks, one library, 5 men's hostels, and 2 ladies hostels. The laboratories are well-equipped with updated computers. Each student is provided with a Wi-Fi password for both the hostel and university.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to have fun with studies.
reviews.review_text: The campus of VIT looks very classy and royal. The facilities at the campus for students such as stationary, cafeteria are perfect. The hostel is very big. They have almost all 2 campuses for hostel and it is maintained by the security and staff.

overview_faqs.question: Why is Ch S D St Theresa's College For Women - Andhra Pradesh so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: Ch.S.D.St.Theresa’s College for Women is a pioneer Institution in the cause of Women’s education. Established in 1953 by the pioneering team of the Sisters of St.Ann of Providence, Italy, with a handful of students at a time when women’s education was looked down with disdain, St.Theresa’s College has today blossomed into a trend-setter in education and has become a coveted destination for the girl students

overview_faqs.question: Is Ch S D St Theresa's College For Women - Andhra Pradesh a known institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Ch. S. D. St. Theresa's College for Women, Eluru, Andhra Pradesh, is one of the best educational institutions in India. It is an autonomous college affiliated to Adikavi Nannaya University, Rajamahendravaram. The National Assessment and Accreditation Council, India, has accredited the college with an 'A' grade. Established in 1953, the college conducts a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate programs mainly in arts, sciences, and commerce. The college is also recognised for its promotion of women's education, good education in the area, and good reputation.

review_content.General: The infrastructure is moderate. The library is huge, and foreign author books are also available. Hostel facilities are good. Sports are encouraged. The canteen food is average. The classrooms are well maintained, and the labs have sufficient equipment.

review_content.Placements: No placements will be provided, and nowadays there is no proper teaching is giving due to lack of staffs because salaries are not settled. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is incomplete. There is not a proper road, no proper ground for playing and hygienic canteen is not available. Still, now there is no development, and the building which was built is still incomplete, and there is no proper environment in the hostel.

review_content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities are average but not high-tech. It is the worst in conducting sports, and no cultural activities will be conducted inside the campus. The worst food will be provided by the canteen. The hostel facilities are also the worst, but the classrooms will be cleaned every day.
