individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College is a very good college.

content.Placements: Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College is one of the more reputed placement colleges. All these college students got placements in good companies in 2021. There are some additional placement charges collected by this college. The student's salary package is 4–8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This college infrastructure is very awesome. The classrooms are very comfortable. Multiple laboratories and libraries are also available at this college. Boys and girls have separate hotels here at this college. Hostel foods are more hygienic. Some sports fields are also here at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to study, and I gained knowledge here and also enjoyed a lot.

content.Placements: The college has a good placement cell for regular students. But there are very few opportunities for part-time students. Most of the part-time students search for a job on their own. Most of the students got placed after the course in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is moderate. The library is huge, and foreign author books are also available. Hostel facilities are good. Sports are encouraged. The canteen food is average. The classrooms are well maintained, and the labs have sufficient equipment.

content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities are average but not high-tech. It is the worst in conducting sports, and no cultural activities will be conducted inside the campus. The worst food will be provided by the canteen. The hostel facilities are also the worst, but the classrooms will be cleaned every day.

content.Other: SMEC is improving a lot nowadays in the respect of its infrastructure, faculty, and food at the hostel. Good place to learn and enjoy. Even the placements are really good. Many companies visit for campus interviews and if any student is not placed they arrange an alumni meet to help the student get placed. This program has been started effectively from this year.

reviews.review_text: The lab facilities are average but not high-tech. It is the worst in conducting sports, and no cultural activities will be conducted inside the campus. The worst food will be provided by the canteen. The hostel facilities are also the worst, but the classrooms will be cleaned every day.

SMEC is improving a lot nowadays in the respect of its infrastructure, faculty, and food at the hostel. Good place to learn and enjoy. Even the placements are really good. Many companies visit for campus interviews and if any student is not placed they arrange an alumni meet to help the student get placed. This program has been started effectively from this year. SMEC is improving a lot nowadays in the respect of its infrastructure, faculty, and food at the hostel. Good place to learn and enjoy. Even the placements are really good. Many companies visit for campus interviews and if any student is not placed they arrange an alumni meet to help the student get placed. This program has been started effectively from this year.

Goods: They are growing at a good pace. During my time they had no placements, but now they have a few. Good bus facility. Bad: The college atmosphere is really bad. Food won't be good. Hostel facilities are not good. Lecturers are not friendly nor do they teach practically. Infrastructure is not good. One has to walk 2 kilometres from public bus stop to the college. faqs.answer:
A:    College of Engineering and Technology, Akola has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR
Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

overview_faqs.question: Is College of Engineering and Technology, Akola a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: College of Engineering and Technology, Akola is a reputed institute for B.Tech, B.Arch, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Architecture & Planning. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. College of Engineering and Technology, Akola has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering and Technology Akola Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is good in every point, with good infrastructure and everything, value for money.

content.Placements: The student who got the CGPA of more than 6 were placed in the course CSE. The highest package is 12 Lacs and the lowest is 2.5 Lacs. The top recruiting companies are TCS and Wipro, etc. The roles offered in the CSE course are data analyst, developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities: Unlimited Wi-Fi use, labs, and classrooms are well designed. Every day, general magazines and booklets are provided. The canteen food is good, and there is a dispensary for emergency medical needs. Different matches and competitions are arranged for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: They don’t have any placements for CSE.

content.Placements: 10% students get placed every year. The highest package of the college’s history is 6LPA and lowest is 2LPA for CSE course. Top rated companies that visit for placements are Capgemeni and Wipro. Just 10% students got internships from the CSE course and none of them belong to any good companies. The top role offered by the companies is that of Trainee Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. High maintenance Labs are available for the students along with a huge library and classrooms. WiFi is available only for educational purpose so it is mostly connected to the computers only. Hostel is good but mess and sport facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is absolutely good, there are experienced staff members and the environment is good.

content.Placements: The placement is good for up to 75% of students who got placed with the highest package of 8.5 LPA. The campus is very large; the whole campus is great. Our college is very good and the campus that they provide is very helpful to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, my college has all the necessary infrastructure and equipment. The faculty we have has a smart board in the classroom and there is e-learning for the students who want to learn online. All facilities that students want from college are available to them.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of its faculty members.

content.Placements: More than 200 students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered ranges between 7 LPA to 8 LPA. The average salary package offered varies from 2 LPA to 3 LPA. Placements are average in our college. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, and Capgemini.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and everything is well organised. Everything is under CCTV surveillance. Our college has a huge library where students can study peacefully. Hostels are very good. It has big hostel rooms than PGs. It also provides a basketball court. There is a huge cricket ground, and the sports department is well-organised.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for students who are concerned only about a degree.

content.Placements: T&P cell is working hard to bring companies to the college, but students are not up to the mark. Many students who get decent placements are mostly off-campus. Wipro, TCS, TAL, Cognizant, Patni, Infosys, Expert Global, WTE, Bajaj, Lupin and Jain Irrigation are the major recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a decent infrastructure with more than 500 computers distributed in multiple labs. The hostel is not available on the campus, but paid transport facilities are provided, which should be free. I am in a remote area, and there are internet issues many times. Still, it is manageable.

For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 334147 and 550562 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 334147, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 307997.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 334147.

Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 71.48. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 76.14 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at College of Engineering and Technology, Akola for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

reviews.review_heading: College is good in every point, with good infrastructure and everything, value for money.
reviews.review_text: Facilities: Unlimited Wi-Fi use, labs, and classrooms are well designed. Every day, general magazines and booklets are provided. The canteen food is good, and there is a dispensary for emergency medical needs. Different matches and competitions are arranged for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: They don’t have any placements for CSE.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. High maintenance Labs are available for the students along with a huge library and classrooms. WiFi is available only for educational purpose so it is mostly connected to the computers only. Hostel is good but mess and sport facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely good, there are experienced staff members and the environment is good.
reviews.review_text: Yes, my college has all the necessary infrastructure and equipment. The faculty we have has a smart board in the classroom and there is e-learning for the students who want to learn online. All facilities that students want from college are available to them.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good and everything is well organised. Everything is under CCTV surveillance. Our college has a huge library where students can study peacefully. Hostels are very good. It has big hostel rooms than PGs. It also provides a basketball court. There is a huge cricket ground, and the sports department is well-organised.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who are concerned only about a degree.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a decent infrastructure with more than 500 computers distributed in multiple labs. The hostel is not available on the campus, but paid transport facilities are provided, which should be free. I am in a remote area, and there are internet issues many times. Still, it is manageable.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for various engineering courses, and it offers valuable jobs for freshers.

reviews.review_heading: A review of the mechanical branch in this college.

The college also has a lawn at the entrance which gives a great and positive vibe. There is an ample amount of parking space available here.

reviews.review_heading: COET, Akola is a college to gain knowledge and ensure having a bright career.

Different departments have separate buildings. Our college has a separate workshop to practise engineering operations. Offices are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and one of the best government colleges.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Good sanitary conditions. Huge library and reading rooms as well as classrooms. Canteen is sufficient and healthy. We have our own indoor and outdoor game space. We even conduct intercollege competition. We have 4 hostels.2 for each sex. Sufficient rooms are available.

reviews.review_heading: We have a great college that is awarded with grade A by NAAC. High percent of campus placements.
reviews.review_text: In the COETA, we have a huge building for each of the branches. And also, we have a great building of architectural department. For playing, we have a huge ground, and also we have a basketball and volleyball courts. For fitness, we have a gym for those who want to stay fit.

reviews.review_heading: The best college with the best atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best. All the facilities are provided like the digital libraries, games, everything for your development. Digital labs are provided to students. Also, the facility of sports is good. The digitised labs and the personal PCs are provided to everyone. The facility of complaint box is there. Printing stations are available in college for printing. A huge amount of internet speed is available. Also, there is a good atmosphere in the research lab. The things which a student needs...

highlights.summary:
The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for St. Johns College of Engineering and Technology (SJCET, Kurnool) admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer:
A:    St. Johns College of Engineering and Technology (SJCET, Kurnool) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

individual_reviews.title: It is very good and beneficial for local students. It is also worth the money.

content.Placements: 10-15% of final year students got placed. The highest package offered is 9 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2.8 LPA. paragraphs: St. Johns College of Engineering and Technology (SJCET, Kurnool) admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, St. Johns College of Engineering and Technology (SJCET, Kurnool) considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET for admission to specific courses.St. Johns College of Engineering and Technology (SJCET, Kurnool)offers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,50,600 - 1,60,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 70,000 - 1,12,600. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: It is very good and beneficial for local students. It is also worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Facilitates and infrastructure are very nice. Cleanliness in labs and equipment for projects, everything is available. According to the course, equipment is allocated. The equipment is very realistic and easy to use.

reviews.review_heading: One of the worst colleges I have ever seen in my life.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility available and labs are the worst. Equipment is not properly provided for students and there are no proper tools for experiments. Classrooms are not well maintained and boards are not clearly visible. The food in the college is not good at all and the hostel is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college and good environment for students without sounds and pollution no disturb.
reviews.review_text: The environment is good, the faculty is good, and the hostel is nice. The campus is green and pleasant, and there are lots of projectors in the classrooms and labs. The library is very good, and they provide bus service for students who live far from the college.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with placements but campus life is more memorable .
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is available within labs only and equipment is good in labs and classrooms. 
Hostels are good in infrastructure and maintenance; the food quality in the mess is very nice and unlimited. 
Every day there is a special menu fixed for day with various items in the mess food .

reviews.review_heading: A genuine review by a genuine student.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms and labs are good, but they won't provide Wi-Fi for good speed; there is only limited speed of Wi-Fi and all the computers are past versions; mostly all are i3.
The electricity will be available in every condition and the lab technician will help us solve any challenge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college improves students' skills.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities are good. The hostel facility is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty and studies
reviews.review_text: Compare to other college in Kurnool district our college has only the lab equipment and library is good. Classrooms, canteen and hostel facilities are good. Food quality is also good, teaching quality is good. Sports and games is less and studies is good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are good. All the canteens are good. Compared to other colleges, it is a disciplined college. When I was studying, it is state-wise 7th rank college. Ragging is prohibited here. The hostel facilities are good. Food served is also good. The college provides all good lab equipment compared to other colleges. Particles are also good. They tell about all particles, and they show everything in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi campus, labs, AC classrooms, beautiful library, good facilities for sports n games, seperate hostel facility for boys n girls. There is a play ground in the college with a basketball court and a badminton court. Table tennis court and swimming pool facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: College Review about campus and faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It's not a problem with infrastructure single campus is used by engineering and MBA and pharmaceutical courses that would be little embarrassing and not at all its not a big deal. Crowd is more that's why college infrastructure need to be improved. Because it's not sufficient to upcoming students.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are good in our department. The placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility, labs, classroom, library, sports, medical facility, food are available at our college with the highest quality, mineral water, cool water are available without cost. The food available in the hostel and canteen is good, and the facilities available are good on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with whole faculty, good placements in 2016, Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, sports, games, classrooms, labs and seminar hall are available in the college. Excellent environment with cool air is provided. AC is available in all labs. Clean and cleared classrooms with cc cameras. Healthy food is available in the canteen at low cost. The hostel is better but not much.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my faculty, good placements in 2017, and good atmosphere in college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, our labs are good. 1000 volumes of books are available regarding technical. Every day in the evening, they provide a free lab for surfing net. This is very helpful for the students. Every year, they conduct sports meet for encouraging the students and college canteen is awesome, and the food facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: My college review of new students.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure with wide classrooms. My college has 3 floors with good space. My college has 6 departments and has a big playground. The college provides good transport facility to all students near by the college. It has food facilities with limited rates and of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Not so satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: They didn't provide us Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are good and well-furnished. The library is quite well, and lots of books were available, but there was no e-library. There are no medical facilities and forget about sports and games. Sometimes, they use to conduct cricket but only one team from the electrical department. In that, first-year to last-year students can participate if wanted.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the best facilities they provided, and they place the students in MNC companies.

content.Placements: I did my engineering in 2016, and I got selected in campus interview for TCS. The college is good for every technology. They got placed for good life. However, the placements for our batch and our senior batch, who are passed out from 2015. Around, 68% of the students got placed. Right now, I am in the lead position in this company, which I got placed. I got a salary of 40K per month. Firstly, they offered me for 18K per month. Many MNC companies visited our college. The companies like Google, Wipro, TCS, and much more are taken many students in every year for all sectors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: This is the number one college in A.P. The infrastructure is also good.

content.Placements: There are 100% placements in our college. In my senior batch, all the seniors got placed in MNC companies like TCS, Hexaware, Infotech, Reliance, Airtel, IBM and Accenture. Some seniors went to US and Japan for M.S. So, I suggest you join this college for a good future.

admission_process.title: Gokul Institute of Technology and Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Gokul Institute of Technology and Sciences admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in JEE Main, GATE, and AP EAMCET, etc.Gokul Institute of Technology and Sciencesoffers courses at UG level in Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences and Business and Management Studies stream. The institute offers B.E. / B.Tech for 4 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 74,600 - 1,40,100. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

courses_data.description: AtGokul Institute of Technology and Sciences, candidates can enroll inB.E. / B.Tech. The course is offered in full time mode for a duration of 3 - 4 years. fees_and_eligibility.overview: DNS Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BBA and B.Ed. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. DNS Group of Institutions courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for DNS Group of Institutions courses stands around INR 90,000 to 2,44,800.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely, the worst place to study.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide the placements. Only they make a false commitment at the time of admission. There is big hoarding stuck on college walls along with their websites regarding placement. Leave the renounced firms, and not even the startups come to the college for the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had an average infrastructure. There are 2 buildings, and within that public school, Cricket Academy, Diploma, B.Tech, MBA, B.Ed, and other courses are being run. There is no proper maintenance. Now, they have started PMKK on the same campus which is quite annoying for technical institutions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied, because we have good faculty and good placements.

review_content.Placements: The Vishnu college has good placements, and there was an excellent company hiring the students. The companies like TCS, HCL, Tech Mahindra etc. The placements are so good in our college when compared to other colleges, and there was an expected salary there.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the Vishnu college was super as there are excellent laboratories and faculty members and also we have a good environment in here. The classrooms available in this college are large, and the quality of the food is good.

faqs.answer: DNS Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBBACandidates passed 10+2 or equivalent from recognized board are eligible to apply.CertificateCandidates passed graduation or equivalent from recognized university or institution are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 3-years Engineering Diploma or passed B.Sc and class 12th with Mathematics and obtained not less than 45% marks in aggregate (40% in for SC/ST).B.EdThe candidate must have passed Graduation or Post Graduation degree with minimum 50% in marks in any discipline from any recognized university.D.PharmaThe minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.M.E./M.TechCandidates passed graduation from recognized university institution are eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognized board/Institute. The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.MBA/PGDMCandidate with grace marks are not allowed for admission. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, the worst place to study.
reviews.review_text: The college had an average infrastructure. There are 2 buildings, and within that public school, Cricket Academy, Diploma, B.Tech, MBA, B.Ed, and other courses are being run. There is no proper maintenance. Now, they have started PMKK on the same campus which is quite annoying for technical institutions.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, because we have good faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Vishnu college was super as there are excellent laboratories and faculty members and also we have a good environment in here. The classrooms available in this college are large, and the quality of the food is good.
